name: TerraNet Holding AB (publ)
summary: TerraNet Holding AB (publ) develops awareness connectivity software for the communication between devices and connectivity in offline environments in the United States and internationally. The company offers software algorithms that allow machine-to-machine communication and streaming of data, including bandwidth-high-definition media independent of mobile networks or other hotspot-dependent networks. It provides vehicle to vehicle, phone to phone, and machine to machine software solutions. TerraNet Holding AB (publ) has a strategic cooperation agreement with Waysure. The company is headquartered in Lund, Sweden.
